# UC-10.16.15 · Symantec Endpoint Protection Security Events and Device Control Activity

## Description

Security client events referencing device control, application control, USB, firewall, or tamper protection show policy enforcement actions that often precede insider misuse or malware attempting to disable protection.

## Value

Centralizes SEP policy violation narratives that are easy to miss in SEPM consoles yet critical for insider-threat and ransomware resilience programs.

## Implementation

Enable Client Security log collection in SEPM exports. Tune the `match` expression to your organization’s localized `Event_Description` strings. Correlate spikes with change windows when new device control rules deploy. For high-volume environments, summarize hourly before alerting.

## SPL

```spl
index=endpoint sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file" earliest=-24h
| eval host=coalesce(Computer_Name, computer_name, host)
| eval desc=coalesce(Event_Description, event_description, _raw)
| where match(lower(desc), "(?i)device control|application control|usb|firewall|tamper")
| stats count by host, desc
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (top descriptions), table (host × description), timeline.
